programme.title: Groundswell
programme.desc: On the heels of a personal and professional setback, Chef Emma travels to Hawaii where she meets Ben, a handsome, reclusive surf instructor whose lessons help her to regain her footing. Starring Lacey Chabert, Ektor Rivera.

programme.title: In My Dreams
programme.desc: Natalie and Nick have no luck in romance. After tossing coins into a fountain, the two then begin dreaming about each other. But, according to fountain mythology, they only have a week to turn those dreams into reality.

programme.title: My Favorite Wedding
programme.desc: Tess, is going to Chicago for the weekend to be the maid of honor at her best friend's wedding. Her boyfriend, Dex, backs out of the trip at the last minute, leaving Tess in the hands of the groom's best man, Michael.

programme.title: Autumn Dreams
programme.desc: A young couple's spur of the moment marriage is immediately annulled by the bride's parents. Years later, they discover that a glitch in the paperwork means they are still husband and wife.

programme.title: Garage Sale Mysteries: Pilot
programme.desc: Jennifer loves scouring garage sales to look for items to sell in her resell shop, but realizes a series of burglaries and a friend's murder may have a connection to the sales.

programme.title: Birthday Wish
programme.desc: A woman expecting to get engaged on her all-important 30th birthday gets a different surprise after she makes her birthday wish: a glimpse into her future - which doesn't resemble anything she's ever imagined for herself.

programme.title: Love on the Menu
programme.desc: A chef makes a deal with a frozen food executive in order to save his restaurant. Stars Autumn Reeser, Kavan Smith, Barbara Niven.

programme.title: My Summer Prince
programme.desc: When a prince finds himself in some hot water for his partying ways, the royal family hires a PR consultant. But when she falls ill, her assistant steps in to take control of the campaign and possibly the prince's heart.

programme.title: Love on Safari
programme.desc: After Kira inherits a wildlife reserve in South Africa, she travels there to meet the no-nonsense head ranger, Tom. He urges her to take a safari in hopes that she will fall in love with the land, the animals, and hopefully him.

programme.title: Valentine Ever After
programme.desc: Big city girls Julia and her best friend Sydney take a trip to a dude ranch in Wyoming for a fun weekend getaway, but after a brawl at the local bar, the girls are sentenced to stay in town and perform community service.

programme.title: A Royal Winter
programme.desc: When Maggie Marks faces a career decision, she flees to Europe for some soul searching. There she encounters a handsome European playboy prince, and lands herself in a world she has never known and finds a new direction in life.

programme.title: Love on Ice
programme.desc: Former figure skating champion, Emily James, now 27 years old and considered a relic in the world of figure skating, gets an improbably shot to reclaim skating glory when a young coach sees greatness in her.

programme.title: Dater's Handbook
programme.desc: A woman changes her personality according to a dating guide book to find a husband but realizes the man she wants is the one who loves her for who she is. Stars Meghan Markle and Kristoffer Polaha.

programme.title: Love on the Air
programme.desc: Competing radio personalities in Chicago find common ground when they have to work together. Stars Alison Sweeney and Jonathan Scarfe.

programme.title: Harvest Moon
programme.desc: When her family goes bankrupt, a city girl travels to the country to try and fix up a struggling pumpkin farm that her father bought as an investment to get her money back. There she meets Brett, the handsome farm manager.

programme.title: Surprised by Love
programme.desc: A young businesswoman tries to convince her uptight parents to accept her boyfriend, but then she falls for an old high-school flame. Stars Hilarie Burton, Paul Campbell, and Tim Conway.

programme.title: Under the Autumn Moon
programme.desc: When an executive convinces her boss that a ranch would be perfect for their company retreats, he agrees to let her check it out. Her plan hits a snag when the owner refuses to sell unless she can promise to preserve its history.

programme.title: Love Takes Flight
programme.desc: In the Hallmark Hall of Fame Presentation, a young girl befriends a lonely widower as a part of her Mission: Find a Friend, uniting their families in a healing twist of fate. Stars Nikki DeLoach and Jeff Hephner.

programme.title: Dating the Delaneys
programme.desc: Three generations of Delaney women explore the highs and lows of modern-day dating, learning that love and romance can be found at any age…and sometimes where you least expect it. Stars Rachel Boston and Paul Campbell.

programme.title: Guiding Emily
programme.desc: Emily's life changes after losing her eyesight, while a guide dog struggles with training. Through a series of missed encounters both overcome their obstacles and find each other. Stars Sarah Drew, Antonio Cupo, Eric McCormack.

programme.title: 3 Bed, 2 Bath, 1 Ghost
programme.desc: A 1920's ghost refuses to leave estate agent Anna's newly listed home. Worse, the spirit is convinced she cannot "pass over" until she gets Anna back together with her ex. Stars Julie Gonzalo, Chris McNally, Madeleine Arthur.

programme.title: Haul Out the Halloween
programme.desc: New, Halloween-obsessed neighbors inspire residents of Evergreen Lane to haul out their spookiest costumes and décor to become EverSCREAM Lane. Stars Lacey Chabert, Wes Brown, Stephen Tobolowsky, Melissa Peterman, Ellen Travolta.

programme.title: Wedding Season
programme.desc: Journalist Trish is on back-to-back bridesmaid duty for her three best friends. Finding herself without a date, she pairs up with photographer Ryan, the brother of her best friend. Stars Stephanie Bennett & Casey Deidrick.

programme.title: Raise a Glass to Love
programme.desc: Aspiring Master Sommelier Jenna returns to her family vineyard to study and is intrigued by the natural methods of the handsome new, Argentinian winemaker, Marcelo. Stars Laura Osnes, Juan Pablo Di Pace.

programme.title: The Wedding Cottage
programme.desc: A wedding guide creator must convince an uninspired artist and owner of a special wedding cottage to renovate the run down cottage to host a contest winning couple for their dream wedding. Starring Erin Krakow and Brendan Penny.

programme.title: Villa Amore
programme.desc: Liara goes to Italy and impulsively buys the villa where her parents met. She soon learns she is in way over her head and must ask a lawyer-turned-handyman to help her renovate. Stars Eloise Mumford, Kevin McGarry.

programme.title: Winter Castle
programme.desc: When Jenny attends a wedding at a magical ice hotel, she is surprised when she connects with the best man, Craig, and his daughter. Will the romance of the hotel bring them together? Stars Emilie Ullerup and Kevin McGarry.

programme.title: Taking a Shot at Love
programme.desc: Jenna, a former professional dancer, uses ballet to help a hockey player get back on the ice. Stars Alexa PenaVega and Luke Macfarlane.

programme.title: Polar Opposites
programme.desc: Emma needs to get to Antarctica to reach her father and travels to South America but can't get on a boat for the last leg. She sneaks onto a cruise ship and meets engineer Andy. Stars Rhiannon Fish and Markian Tarasiuk.

programme.title: A Summer Romance
programme.desc: Samantha's Montana ranch is her family's legacy, so when a developer shows up to buy it, Sam isn't interested. But as he tries to win her trust and her ranch, Sam finds he might also be winning her heart. Erin Krakow, Ryan Paevey.

programme.title: Two Tickets to Paradise
programme.desc: When two weddings are ruined by both the bride and groom getting left at the altar, they still decide to take their honeymoons, not knowing they are heading to the same resort in Hawaii. Stars Ashley Williams, Ryan Paevey.

programme.title: Caught by Love
programme.desc: While on a journey of self-discovery, a resort guest gets swept into an undercover investigation for stolen jewels that turns into an unexpected and adventurous romance. Starring Rachael Leigh Cook and Luke Macfarlane.

programme.title: Caribbean Summer
programme.desc: JADE, a news producer heads to the Caribbean for relaxation, only to fall victim to a rental scam. Serendipitously, she befriends the real owner, FORD, and discovers fun and romance. Stars Heather Hemmens and Ser'Darius Blain.

programme.title: The Groomsmen First Look
programme.desc: A cautious pediatrician and an overseas doctor, meet at a wedding in Philadelphia, but the long distance, family, and their friends may hinder their budding romance. Stars BJ Britt, Heather Hemmens, Jonathan Bennett, Tyler Hynes.

programme.title: Notes of Autumn
programme.desc: Ellie, a fun-loving, classically-trained pianist living in the city, and her best friend Leo, a novelist, in rural Canada swap homes to recharge their passions. Stars Ashley Williams, Luke Macfarlane, Marcus Rosner, Peter Porte.

programme.title: Adventures in Love & Birding
programme.desc: A single mom agrees to be the partner of a bird enthusiast for a birding competition but misunderstands the assignment and tells everyone she's his new girlfriend instead of just his teammate. Stars Rachel Boston, Andrew Walker.

programme.title: The 27-Hour Day
programme.desc: An entrepreneur takes a break from her wellness empire for some much-needed work-life balance but realizes it won't be easy. Will a relaxing retreat and new romance change her life, forever? Stars Autumn Reeser, Andrew Walker.

programme.title: The Baker's Son
programme.desc: Matt's passion transforms his bread from bland to extraordinary. When his bread loses its magic, the island locals panic and turn to Annie, Matt's childhood friend and true love for help. Stars Eloise Mumford, Brant Daugherty.

programme.title: The Stars Between Us
programme.desc: Seven years ago, Kim made a connection with a stranger during an eclipse event. Now a fledgling news reporter, Kim returns to Illinois for this year's eclipse, unaware that their paths may cross again. Stars Sarah Drew, Matt Long.

programme.title: Love of the Irish
programme.desc: Tired of her bad luck, Fiona takes her mom on a trip to Ireland to turn things around where she meets a charming single dad who helps her make her own luck. Stars Shenae Grimes-Beech, Stephen Hagan, Moira Kelly.

programme.title: A Grand Ole Opry Christmas (Extended Cut)
programme.desc: Grand Ole Opry magic takes Gentry and her friend, Mac, back in time to Christmas 1995. There, she's able to spend time with her late country star dad, as well as discover romance with Mac. Starring Nikki DeLoach, Kris Polaha.

programme.title: A Very Merry Mix-Up
programme.desc: A woman goes to meet her fiancé's family at Christmas and winds up at the wrong house. Once the mistake is corrected, she realizes that her bond with the wrong family, and their eligible son, was stronger than she expected.

programme.title: The Christmas Note
programme.desc: Gretchen returns to her hometown with son Ethan and meets her new neighbor Melissa. Melissa's mother has passed away, and the two form a reluctant friendship when Melissa discovers she has a sibling she never knew about.

programme.title: A Veteran's Christmas
programme.desc: Separated from her K9 partner Captain Grace is stranded in a small town for Christmas. Judge Joe offers her a place to stay and takes it upon himself to show Grace everything she's been missing. Stars Eloise Mumford, Sean Faris.

programme.title: Christmas on Duty
programme.desc: After a snowstorm prevents all the presents from being delivered to base, two rival marines must team up for a special mission…to save Christmas. Stars Janel Parrish, Parker Young, Peter Jacobson.

programme.title: Sugarplummed
programme.desc: When Emily wishes for a perfect Christmas like the ones found in the popular "Sugarplum" movies, she's shocked when Sugarplum herself appears to help her fulfill it. Stars Maggie Lawson and Janel Parrish.

programme.title: Small Town Christmas
programme.desc: When a young novelist travels to the hometown of the man who inspired her book, she reconnects with an old flame and helps restore the town's Christmas traditions. Stars Kristoffer Polaha and Ashley Newbrough.

programme.title: Hope at Christmas
programme.desc: Sydney and her young daughter come to small town Hopewell for Christmas. There, they spend time at the local bookstore, getting to know its owner, Bea, and local teacher, Mac. Stars Scottie Thompson, Ryan Paevey.

programme.title: Coyote Creek Christmas
programme.desc: While throwing a "Christmas Around the World" party at her family's inn, an event planner discovers Christmas magic with a charming father-son duo whose presence brings about tension and joy. Stars Janel Parrish and Ryan Paevey.

programme.title: Christmas Waltz
programme.desc: After Avery's storybook Christmas wedding is canceled, a dance instructor helps her face her fears in life and fulfill her dream of learning to dance. Stars Lacey Chabert and Will Kemp.

programme.title: A Suite Holiday Romance
programme.desc: Sabrina, an aspiring writer rejoices when hired to ghostwrite for a famous art dealer at an iconic hotel during Christmas. She learns to take risks and falls in love with a British visitor. Jessy Schram, Dominic Sherwood.

programme.title: Believe in Christmas
programme.desc: With no other plans for Christmas, best friends BEA and EMILIA travel to Christmasland, a magical place filled with hope, holiday miracles, and romance. But could this all be too good to be true? Stars Meghan Ory, John Reardon.

programme.title: Northern Lights of Christmas
programme.desc: Pilot Zoey has been working towards her goal of owning her own plane, but everything is thrown off course when she inherits a reindeer farm, along with the handsome ranch hand Alec. Stars Ashley Williams, Corey Sevier.

programme.title: A Christmas Angel Match
programme.desc: Monica, a Christmas angel, works to set couples up at the most wonderful time of year. That is, until Michael is assigned to the same couple and their differing tactics cause chaos. Starring Meghan Ory and Benjamin Ayres.

programme.title: A Royal Queens Christmas
programme.desc: A prince finds his way to Queens during Christmas when a local woman enlists his help with a children's Christmas show. Stars Megan Park, Julian Morris.

programme.title: 'Tis the Season
programme.desc: When Kate's best friends sign her up for a holiday-themed dating service, she reluctantly joins, but has no idea just how much her life is about to change. Stars Mae Whitman, Julian Morris, Jane Seymour, and Mary McDonnell.

programme.title: A Make or Break Holiday
programme.desc: Liv and Daniel grow frustrated planning Christmas in their new home and agree to go on a break, but they must pretend to still be a happy couple as they host their families for Christmas. Starring Hunter King, and Evan Roderick.

programme.title: Christmas with the Darlings
programme.desc: When an assistant gives her final notice, she is drawn into helping the charming, younger brother of her wealthy boss as he looks after his orphaned nieces and nephew through Christmas. Stars Katrina Law and Carlo Marks.

programme.title: The More the Merrier
programme.desc: During a Christmas Eve blizzard, ER Doctor, Alice, and newly hired cardiologist, Brian, team up to deliver four babies while spreading holiday joy for the patients and hospital staff. Stars Rachel Boston, Brendan Penny.

programme.title: Deck the Halls on Cherry Lane
programme.desc: We're back for another Christmas on 7 Cherry Lane, this time in 1966, 1981, and 2000. Stars John Brotherton, Erin Cahill, Brooke D'Orsay, Chelsea Hobbs, Ben Hollingsworth, Sam Page.

programme.title: Crossword Mysteries: Abracadaver
programme.desc: During her birthday celebration, Tess and Logan find themselves swept up in a world that isn't always what it seems when the headlining magician at the Magic Manor winds up dead. Starring Lacey Chabert, Brennan Elliott.

programme.title: Crossword Mysteries: Terminal Descent
programme.desc: When Tess prepares for a crossword challenge against a super computer, the engineer behind it is murdered, spurring her and Logan to seek answers before they become the next victims. Starring Lacey Chabert and Brennan Elliott.

programme.title: Crossword Mysteries: Riddle Me Dead
programme.desc: Tess gets invited to be a part of a popular game show, but when the host is unexpectedly murdered, she and Detective Logan O'Connor seek to uncover who was behind it all. Starring Lacey Chabert and Brennan Elliott.

programme.title: Garage Sale Mysteries: Pilot
programme.desc: Jennifer loves scouring garage sales to look for items to sell in her resell shop, but realizes a series of burglaries and a friend's murder may have a connection to the sales.

programme.title: Garage Sale Mysteries: All That Glitters
programme.desc: Jennifer Shannon has an eye for antiques and a mind for solving mysteries. When she buys a storage unit at auction, she has no idea she's opening the door to murder, and realizes the killer is after something in the storage unit.

programme.title: Garage Sale Mysteries: The Deadly Room
programme.desc: Jennifer's real-estate agent pal dies while trying to negate rumors about a home she's selling. The police believe there was no foul play, but Jennifer suspects that her friend was killed after she researches other deaths.

programme.title: Garage Sale Mysteries: The Wedding Dress
programme.desc: In Jennifer Shannon's latest quest, she stumbles upon a 30 year-old cold case when she comes across a vintage wedding dress containing a clue. As Jenn tracks down the owner, she finds that the Groom mysteriously disappeared.

programme.title: Garage Sale Mysteries: Guilty Until Proven Innocent
programme.desc: When Jenn's old pal Sandra becomes the prime suspect in a murder case, it'll be up to her to discover who done it before time runs out. Stars Lori Loughlin, Sarah Strange and Steve Bacic.

programme.title: Flower Shop Mystery: Mum's the Word
programme.desc: Abby Knight is the proud owner of her hometown flower shop, but a SUV just rammed her vintage Corvette in a hit-and-run. She's determined to track down the driver, but the trail turns deadly.

programme.title: Flower Shop Mystery: Snipped in the Bud
programme.desc: When a bouquet from her shop is found at the murder scene of a professor and former courtroom adversary of Abby Knight, a former attorney-turned-small-town-florist, she finds herself as the main suspect. Stars Brooke Shields.

programme.title: Flower Shop Mystery: Dearly Depotted
programme.desc: Abby Knight, ex-lawyer and crime buff, and the owner of Bloomers Flower Shop, is having a week to be reckoned with. A bridesmaid at her drama queen cousin's wedding, Abby ends having to find out who murdered a wedding crasher.

programme.title: Fixer Upper Mysteries: Framed for Murder
programme.desc: Shannon Hammer, owner of Hammer Construction Company, is an expert in Victorian home restoration. Through her renovations she will find clues to uncover a house's secret past and in turn become an unlikely sleuth.

programme.title: Fixer Upper Mysteries: Concrete Evidence
programme.desc: When Mac first moved to Lighthouse Cove, he bought the historic lighthouse mansion that the town is named after. During renovation demolition, the bones of a teenage girl were discovered. Stars Jewel and Colin Ferguson.

programme.title: Fixer Upper Mysteries: Deadly Deed
programme.desc: Shannon Hughes has taken on a charity project renovating an old Victorian mansion. When a local banker is found murdered inside, Shannon must dust off the clues and cement the truth before her renovation becomes a demolition.

programme.title: A Beautiful Place to Die: A Martha's Vineyard Mystery
programme.desc: After being forced into retirement, former detective Jeff Jackson returns to a quiet life on Martha's Vineyard. Quiet, at least, until a body washes up and he's drawn back into crime solving. Stars Jesse Metcalfe, Sarah Lind.

programme.title: Riddled with Deceit: A Martha's Vineyard Mystery
programme.desc: Former detective Jeff Jackson teams up with Dr. Zee Madeiras to track down their friend's missing emerald brooch, a thief, and also... a murderer. Stars Jesse Metcalfe, Sarah Lind.

programme.title: Ships in the Night: A Martha's Vineyard Mystery
programme.desc: When an art gallery robbery leads to the death of the contemptible gallery manager, former Boston detective teams up with local doctor--and old flame-- to catch the killer. Stars Jesse Metcalfe and Sarah Lind.

programme.title: Poisoned in Paradise: A Martha's Vineyard Mystery
programme.desc: When a local waitress is found dead on the beach and a mysterious deposit appears in Zee's bank account, Martha's Vineyard proves to be all but the simple, scenic life Jeff Jackson was after. Stars Jesse Metcalfe and Sarah Lind.

programme.title: Mystery Island: Pilot
programme.desc: When a visit to a mystery-themed resort goes wrong, a local detective and a vacationing British criminal psychiatrist team up to solve a real murder. Starring Elizabeth Henstridge, Charlie Weber.

programme.title: Haunted Harmony Mysteries: Murder in G Major
programme.desc: A new teacher at an Irish prep school is shocked to find a ghost haunting her house. She decides to help solve his murder in the hopes that it will allow him to move on. Stars Tamera Mowry-Housley, Risteard Cooper, Marco Grazzini.
